nonGoals: Do NOT modify normalize-text.ts, word-count.ts, truncate-words.ts, or any existing test cases
Do NOT add tests in this deliverable
objective: Implement estimateReadingTime(text, wordsPerMinute?) composing on wordCount with Math.ceil rounding and default 200 wpm, then re-export from the barrel.
planText:
Create apps/web/src/lib/text-utilities/estimate-reading-time.ts:
- Import { wordCount } from './word-count'
- Export function estimateReadingTime(text: string, wordsPerMinute: number = 200): number
- Call wordCount(text); if 0 return 0; else return Math.ceil(wordCount / wordsPerMinute)
Then in apps/web/src/lib/text-utilities/index.ts add:
- export { estimateReadingTime } from './estimate-reading-time'

nonGoals: Do NOT modify existing describe blocks for normalizeText, wordCount, or truncateWords
Do NOT change the implementation in this deliverable
objective: Add unit tests for estimateReadingTime covering empty, whitespace-only, default-wpm boundary cases, and a custom wpm scenario.
planText:
In apps/web/src/lib/text-utilities/index.test.ts:
- Import { estimateReadingTime } from './index' alongside existing imports
- Add a new describe('estimateReadingTime', ...) block with these focused it cases:
  1. empty string → 0
  2. whitespace-only input → 0
  3. 200 words @ default 200 wpm → 1
  4. 201 words @ default 200 wpm → 2
  5. custom wpm: 100 words @ 50 wpm → 2
- Build the 200-word and 201-word test strings programmatically (e.g. Array(200).fill('word').join(' '))
